name: Monkey Bread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:25
Combine first 4 ingredients in a saucepan. Heat until butter melts. Cool to 105 degrees to 115 degrees. Add yeast and stir until dissolved. Let stand for 5 minutes. Combine flour and milk mixture in a large bowl; stir until blended. Cover and let rise in a warm place (85 degrees), free from drafts, for 1 hour and 20 minutes or until doubled in bulk. Punch dough down and shape into 1-1/2-inch balls. Dip each ball in melted butter. Layer balls in a greased 10-inch one-piece tube pan or Bundt pan. Cover and repeat rising procedure for 45 minutes or until doubled. Bake at 375 degrees for 35 minutes. Cool in pan for 5 minutes; then invert.
Yield: one 10-inch ring.
